basic_details.job_title: IIPA Managing Editor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Public Administration (IIPA) has officially announced the Managing Editor Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates up to 45 years of age and holding a Ph.D. in any Social Science subject, preferably in Public Administration or Public Policy, can submit their offline applications on or before 31 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in any Social Science subject, preferably in Public Administration / Public Policy.
qualification.details: Ph.D. in any Social Science subject, preferably in Public Administration / Public Policy.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.iipa.org.in/cms/public/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIPA Managing Editor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIPA Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.iipa.org.in/cms/public/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIPA Managing Editor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIPA Managing Editor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Managing Editor position at IIPA is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Managing Editor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in any Social Science subject. A specialization in Public Administration or Public Policy is preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Managing Editor position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Managing Editor post is 45 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Managing Editor role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Managing Editor position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 90,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the IIPA Managing Editor position?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You should download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and send it along with necessary documents via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the type of employment for this post?
faq.answer: The position of Managing Editor at IIPA is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Managing Editor post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the post of Managing Editor in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indian Institute of Public Administration located?
faq.answer: The Indian Institute of Public Administration is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110002.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and download the application form from the official website of the Indian Institute of Public Administration, which is https://www.iipa.org.in/cms/public/.
